description.en: Create an auction for your NFT or SFT on OOX marketplace. Set minimum and maximum bid prices, deadline, and accepted payment token.
description.de: Eine Auktion für dein NFT oder SFT auf dem OOX-Marktplatz erstellen. Lege Mindest- und Höchstgebote, Frist und akzeptiertes Zahlungstoken fest.
description.es: Create an auction for your NFT or SFT on OOX marketplace. Set minimum and maximum bid prices, deadline, and accepted payment token.
description.fr: Create an auction for your NFT or SFT on OOX marketplace. Set minimum and maximum bid prices, deadline, and accepted payment token.
description.ro: Create an auction for your NFT or SFT on OOX marketplace. Set minimum and maximum bid prices, deadline, and accepted payment token.
description.it: Create an auction for your NFT or SFT on OOX marketplace. Set minimum and maximum bid prices, deadline, and accepted payment token.

description.en: The NFT or SFT to auction.
description.de: Das zu versteigernde NFT oder SFT.
description.es: The NFT or SFT to auction.
description.fr: The NFT or SFT to auction.
description.ro: The NFT or SFT to auction.
description.it: The NFT or SFT to auction.

description.en: Minimum bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.es: Minimum bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.fr: Minimum bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.ro: Minimum bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.it: Minimum bid amount in the accepted payment token.

description.en: Maximum bid amount (set to 0 for no maximum).
description.es: Maximum bid amount (set to 0 for no maximum).
description.fr: Maximum bid amount (set to 0 for no maximum).
description.ro: Maximum bid amount (set to 0 for no maximum).
description.it: Maximum bid amount (set to 0 for no maximum).

description.en: Auction deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.es: Auction deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.fr: Auction deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.ro: Auction deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).
description.it: Auction deadline timestamp (Unix timestamp in seconds).

description.en: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.de: Akzeptiertes Zahlungstoken (EGLD für eGold oder ESDT-Token-Kennung).
description.es: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.fr: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.ro: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
description.it: Accepted payment token identifier (EGLD for eGold, or ESDT token identifier).
